title: MiRNA sequencing raw data
author: Shaoyuan Chen
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Exosomes were extracted from peripheral blood samples of 7 AMI patients (AMI 1-7) and 9 healthy people (NC 1-9), and RNA was extracted for miRNA sequencing.
steps_raw: Exosomes were extracted from peripheral blood samples of 7 AMI patients (AMI 1-7) and 9 healthy people (NC 1-9), and RNA was extracted for miRNA sequencing.
